meta.title: Softfoxxy — Websites, Apps & Bots
meta.description: Full-Stack developer for hire — websites, mobile apps, and bots for Telegram, Discord & VK. End-to-end: design, code, deploy.
meta.keywords: full-stack developer, web development, hire developer, Telegram bot, mobile app, React, Next.js, TypeScript, freelance

hero.title: Your technical partner
hero.subtitle: I build websites, mobile & desktop apps, and bots for Telegram, Discord, and VK — from the first call to a product running in production.

services.label: Services
services.title: What I do
services.subtitle: I take on complex projects end-to-end — not just code, but interface, architecture, and launch.

web.title: Web platforms
web.description: CRM, dashboards, admin panels, SaaS and marketplaces with thoughtful architecture.

mobile.title: Mobile & desktop
mobile.description: Apps for iPhone, Android, Windows, macOS, and Linux — or any other device you need.

bots.title: Bots & automation
bots.description: Telegram, Discord, and VK Max — orders, support, notifications integrated with your business.

design.title: Interface design
design.description: UI/UX and layouts in Illustrator and Photoshop — looks premium, works clearly.

backend.title: Backend & data
backend.description: APIs, PostgreSQL, Redis, queues and reliable storage — a foundation built to scale.

devops.title: Deploy & infrastructure
devops.description: Docker, Git, staging environments — your product stays stable after launch.

process.label: Process
process.title: My process
process.subtitle: Transparent and step-by-step — you always know where the project stands.

discover.title: Call & scope
discover.description: I dig into the business goal, audience, and constraints — and define what success looks like.

plan.title: Plan & estimate
plan.description: I propose architecture, milestones, and timeline. Pricing is discussed on a call — no surprises.

build.title: Development
build.description: I share staging builds along the way. You see progress instead of waiting in silence.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Deploy, testing, documentation, and handoff. Everything runs in production.

support.title: Support
support.description: I don't disappear after delivery — iterations, scaling, and maintenance by agreement.

work.label: Work
work.title: Projects
work.subtitle: Real cases and demo projects that show my level and approach.

portfolio.title: Softfoxxy
portfolio.description: Portfolio with animations, bilingual UI, thoughtful typography, and responsive layout. Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Framer Motion.

crm.title: CRM for service business
crm.description: Dashboard with clients, orders, analytics, and roles. Auth, filters, real-time notifications.

bot.title: Telegram booking bot
bot.description: Client booking bot with admin panel, scheduling, and push notifications for the business owner.

saas.title: SaaS Dashboard
saas.description: Multi-tenant platform with subscriptions, analytics, and API. Architecture built to scale.

about.label: About
about.title: Gleb · Softfoxxy
about.tagline: I take on projects end-to-end — from design to deployment. Direct work, no middlemen.

skills.desc: Telegram, Discord, VK — from scratch to production

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's discuss your project
contact.subtitle: Tell me about the task — I'll reply with a plan. Pricing is discussed on a call.
